keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal! England 1, Croatia 0. Harry Kane (England) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! England 1, Croatia 1. Martin Baturina (Croatia) right footed shot from outside the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Petar Sucic.
Goal! England 2, Croatia 1. Harry Kane (England) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Declan Rice with a cross following a corner.
Goal! England 2, Croatia 2. Petar Musa (Croatia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Ivan Perisic with a headed pass.
Second Half begins England 2, Croatia 2.
Goal! England 3, Croatia 2. Jude Bellingham (England) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Elliot Anderson.
Substitution, Croatia. Mateo Kovacic replaces Luka Modric.
Substitution, Croatia. Igor Matanovic replaces Petar Musa.
Substitution, Croatia. Marco Pasalic replaces Luka Vuskovic.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Substitution, England. Morgan Rogers replaces Declan Rice.
Substitution, England. Bukayo Saka replaces Noni Madueke.
Substitution, England. Marcus Rashford replaces Anthony Gordon.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Croatia. Andrej Kramaric replaces Mario Pasalic.
Substitution, Croatia. Nikola Vlasic replaces Martin Baturina.
Substitution, England. Djed Spence replaces Jude Bellingham.
Goal! England 4, Croatia 2. Marcus Rashford (England) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Bukayo Saka.
Substitution, England. Marc Guéhi replaces John Stones.
Second Half ends, England 4, Croatia 2.
